title: callista devoniana
intro: Callista devoniana, also known as the Devonshire callista or callista, is a species of sea slug, a type of marine gastropod mollusk. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to its bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Callista devoniana include its potential to lower blood pressure and have anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparation of Callista devoniana is typically done through drying and grinding of the plant, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules.
